patterns.name: Double Bottom
patterns.note: Two near-equal troughs; breaks up above the peak (neckline).

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 129% ABOVE the consolidated figure — typically a non-recurring parent-level gain or subsidiary dividends. Treat the unconsolidated EPS and any P/E derived from it with caution; the consolidated basis is more conservative.
